data.biography:
Ylermi Rajamaa (s. 1981) on suomalainen näyttelijä ja muusikko. Hän valmistui ylioppilaaksi Sibelius-lukiosta vuonna 2000 ja näyttelijäksi Teatterikorkeakoulusta vuonna 2010. Hän on myös Plutonium 74 -yhtyeen laulaja ja kosketinsoittaja. Hänen näyttelijäuransa on lähtenyt käyntiin Masalan nuorisoteatterista.

Rajamaa on myös mukana Osakeyhtye-nimisessä kokoonpanossa laulajana ja kitaristina. Lisäksi hän on tehnyt yhtyeelle kappaleen "Kahden tähden cowboytarina". Munamiehelle hän on tehnyt myös kappaleen "Usein öisin uneksin".

Plutonium 74 -yhtyeessä Rajamaa on myös toiminut lauluntekijänä, esimerkiksi Alakerran orkesteri on kokonaan Rajamaan käsialaa. Rajamaa on ollut yhtyeen kappaleiden sävellystyössä mukana.

Rajamaa vierailee myös laulajana LBJ:n levyllä Live material jolle hän on sanoittanut kappaleen Murhataan mies.
data.name: Ylermi Rajamaa

data.biography:
Watching Korean dramas with her grandmother when she was a child, she grew interested in arts and entertainment, and dreamed of being an actress or a film director. When she was in high school, her father suggested her to try acting. She then enrolled in the Acting Department of the Korea National University of Arts and started auditioning, at first without an agency.

She made her debut through several theater and independent films, and drew attention in 2015 with her role in Great Stories: Kim Sisters. In April 2016 she became an ambassador for Friends of Hope.
data.name: Choi Bae-young

data.biography: 2008년 단역 배우로 연기 활동을 시작하였으며, 2015년 TV CHOSUN · TvN 드라마 《위대한 이야기 - 김시스터즈》의 애자 역으로 주연을 맡으며 상업극에 데뷔하였다.
data.name: Choi Bae-young

data.biography:
Jes Jespipat Tilapornputt, originally nicknamed Por, is a Thai actor managed by The One Enterprise and Be On Cloud. He's the nephew of famed jazz saxophonist Metawat Sapsanyakorn. After graduating from Bangkok Christian College, he went on to study at Kasetsart Business School, obtaining a master's in applied finance with a GPA of 3.91.

Jes made his first foray into the entertainment industry in 2009 when he won the Pop Da'vance competition and was persuaded by director Poj Arnon to act in the films "Oh My Ghosts!" and "Sassy Player". Jes landed his first role as a lakorn leading man in "Cheewit Puer Kah Huajai Puer Tur".

Jes's family owns Pornpat Market in Rangsit.
data.name: Jespipat Tilapornputt

data.biography: เจษฎ์พิพัฒ ติละพรพัฒน์ ชื่อเล่น เจษ หรือ ปอ เป็นนักแสดง นายแบบ นักร้องและพิธีกรชาวไทย สังกัดเดอะ วัน เอ็นเตอร์ไพรส์ และสังกัด Be On Cloud
data.name: เจษฎ์พิพัฒ ติละพรพัฒน์

data.biography:
Jes Jespipat Tilapornputt, originalmente apelidado de Por, é um ator tailandês administrado pela The One Enterprise e Be On Cloud. Ele é sobrinho do famoso saxofonista de jazz Metawat Sapsanyakorn. Depois de se formar no Bangkok Christian College, ele estudou na Kasetsart Business School, obtendo um mestrado em finanças aplicadas com GPA de 3,91.

Jes fez sua primeira incursão na indústria do entretenimento em 2009, quando ganhou o concurso Pop Da'vance e foi persuadido pelo diretor Poj Arnon a atuar nos filmes "Oh My Ghosts!" e "Jogador atrevido". Jes conseguiu seu primeiro papel como protagonista lakorn em "Cheewit Puer Kah Huajai Puer Tur".
data.name: Jespipat Tilapornputt
杰斯皮帕特·蒂拉蓬普特
傑斯皮帕特·蒂拉蓬普特

data.biography: Amanda Balen is a backup dancer and choreographer. Balen has appeared in La La Land, A Star Is Born (2018), Confessions of a Teenage Drama Queen and Hamilton. She previously performed with Lady Gaga and Celine Dion.
data.name: Amanda Balen

data.biography: 阿曼达·巴伦（Amanda Balen）是伴舞和编舞。Balen 曾出演过《爱乐之城》、《一个明星的诞生》（2018 年）、《少年戏剧女王的自白》和《汉密尔顿》。她之前曾与Lady Gaga和席琳·迪翁（Celine Dion）合作演出。
data.name: 阿曼达·巴伦

data.biography: 阿曼達·巴倫（Amanda Balen）是伴舞和編舞。Balen 曾出演過《愛樂之城》、《一個明星的誕生》（2018 年）、《少年戲劇女王的自白》和《鹹美頓》。她之前曾與 Lady Gaga 和席琳·迪翁（Celine Dion）合作演出。
data.name: 阿曼達·巴倫

data.biography: Roxy Striar was born Roxanne Jillian Striar. She is a producer and actress, known for Madness in the Method (2019), Indigo (2019) and Collider Live (2018).
data.name: Roxy Striar

data.biography: Kumud Mishra is an Indian actor who works in Hindi-language films. One of his earliest roles was in the 1995 Doordarshan drama Swabhimaan where he played the role of Eknath, a trade union leader. Following an appearance as the younger version of Rishi Kapoor's character in the 2011 drama Patiala House, his career took an upswing after he starred as Khatana alongside Rishi's son Ranbir Kapoor in Rockstar the same year.
data.name: Kumud Mishra

data.biography: 库穆德·米什拉 （Kumud Mishra） 是一位印度演员，在印地语电影中工作。他最早的角色之一是在 1995 年的 Doordarshan 电视剧 Swabhimaan 中，他扮演工会领袖 Eknath 的角色。在 2011 年的电视剧《帕蒂亚拉之家》中饰演里希·卡普尔 （Rishi Kapoor） 角色的年轻版本后，他的职业生涯在同年与里希的儿子兰比尔·卡普尔 （Ranbir Kapoor） 一起在 Rockstar 中饰演 Khatana。
data.name: 库穆德·米什拉

data.biography: 庫穆德·米什拉 （Kumud Mishra） 是一位印度演員，在印地語電影中工作。他最早的角色之一是在 1995 年的 Doordarshan 電視劇 Swabhimaan 中，他扮演工會領袖 Eknath 的角色。在 2011 年的電視劇《帕蒂亞拉之家》中飾演裏希·卡普爾 （Rishi Kapoor） 角色的年輕版本後，他的職業生涯在同年與裏希的兒子蘭比爾·卡普爾 （Ranbir Kapoor） 一起在 Rockstar 中飾演 Khatana。
data.name: 庫穆德·米什拉
